event: View of Peterhof Palace Grand Cascade
description: A watercolor depicting the Grand Cascade of Peterhof Palace in Russia. Multiple tiers of fountains send arcs of water cascading down stone terraces. Golden statues stand on pedestals along the cascade. The ornate palace building stretches across the background with its classical facade. The scene is rendered in warm, luminous tones with the water effects captured in transparent washes of blue and white.
